seoTitle: Tumut vs Tuncester — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tumut and Tuncester. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tumut and Tuncester.
heading: Tumut vs Tuncester — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tumut, New South Wales and Tuncester, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tuncester has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tumut (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tumut or Tuncester safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tumut has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Tuncester scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tumut scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Tuncester scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tumut or Tuncester?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tuncester has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
